{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Sandviper body
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Sandviper sect]] calls the [[Bloodforged Iron body]] the '[[Sandviper body]]'.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Sandviper body]] is received during an advancement ceremony.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
